headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Arista Networks (ANET) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Arista Networks (ANET) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Ciena vs. Arista Networks: Which AI Networking Stock is the Better Buy?
summary: CIEN and ANET are capitalizing on booming AI networking demand, but differences in growth outlook, estimates and valuation may sway investors.
